capture_learnings.description:
Reflect on completed work and persist observations as mission
notes. Reads source file, generates reflection, saves as note.

read_source.description: Read the file that was worked on

reflect.description: Reflect on what was learned from this task

content_key.description: Context key containing the note content

create.description:
Create a new source file. Gathers project context, generates
content via inference, writes to disk. Called by file_ops
when the target file does not exist.

context_budget.description: Maximum files to include in context bundle

select_prompt.description: Select prompt template based on variant

design_and_plan.description:
Design or reconcile project architecture, derive project goals,
then generate or revise the task plan. Auto-detects whether full
architecture reconciliation is needed (drift detected) or can be
skipped (no drift — straight to plan revision).

build_repomap.description: Build AST-based dependency map of existing code

check_drift.description: Compare architecture against files on disk to detect drift

parse_architecture.description: Parse architecture JSON and store as mission.architecture

parse_architecture_then_revise.description: Parse updated architecture, then revise plan

dispatch_revise.description: Dispatch plan revision — add missing tasks, reorder, or obsolete

input_map.observation: Review the plan for missing tasks, ordering issues, or gaps. Add tasks for data files, integration glue, or tests if needed. Reorder tasks if dependencies are wrong. Do NOT remove completed tasks.

domain_research.description: Search for domain knowledge to inform the project

content_key.description: Context key containing the note content

generate_plan.description: Generate task plan aligned to architecture blueprint

generate_plan_fallback.description: Generate plan without structured architecture (parse failed)

parse_plan.description: Parse plan JSON into task records, validated against architecture

derive_goals.description: Derive structural and functional goals from architecture and objective

complete.description: Architecture designed, goals derived, plan created/revised

params.message: Failed to design architecture and create plan

diagnose_issue.description:
Deep issue diagnosis. Traces the error path, generates fix
hypotheses, and creates a targeted fix task. Does not modify
files — produces understanding and follow-up work.

context_budget.description: Maximum files to include in context bundle

check_target.description: Try to read the target file

reproduce_mentally.description: Trace the error execution path — understand, don't fix

compile_diagnosis.description: Assemble structured diagnosis from analysis and hypotheses

create_fix_task.description: Create a follow-up fix task from the diagnosis

error_file_not_found.description: File not found — scan project to report what exists

file_ops.description:
File operations lifecycle. Routes to create/patch/rewrite,
validates output, self-corrects on failure, reports to
mission_control via structured returns.

check_exists.description: Check whether target file exists on disk

run_create.description: File does not exist — create it

discover_imports.description: Follow import statements and load referenced files

run_set_env.description: Unknown file type — infer validation tooling

self_correct.description: Validation failed — rewrite file to fix errors

input_map.flow_directive: Fix validation errors in the file
Diagnose why validation keeps failing after self-correction
input_map.error_description: Self-correction retries exhausted — validation still failing

log_and_report_success.description: Log non-blocking issues as notes, then report success

interact.description:
Use the product. Run it, interact with it, observe behavior,
test specific features. Returns observations to the director.
Plans an execution persona, then dispatches run_session.

context_budget.description: Maximum files to include in context bundle

plan_interaction.description: Craft execution persona and session context

run_session.description: Execute product interaction via persona-driven terminal

evaluate_outcome.description: Evaluate whether the product worked correctly

CTX_001.description: Required context key is never published by any reachable upstream step

CTX_002.description: Optional context key referenced in prompt template but never published upstream

CTX_003.description: Published context key is never consumed by any downstream step

CTX_004.description: Prompt template references context key not declared in step's context requirements

CTX_005.description: Prompt template references input key not declared in flow's input specification

CTX_006.description: Required context key is only published on some execution paths

REF_001.description: $ref references an input key not declared in flow input specification

REF_002.description: $ref references a context key not published by any reachable upstream step

REF_003.description: Dynamic flow reference in tail_call — target flow cannot be statically validated

TRN_001.description: Resolver transition targets a step that does not exist

TRN_003.description: No terminal step or tail_call reachable from entry — flow never completes

TRN_004.description: Step has no outgoing transitions and is not terminal

TRN_005.description: LLM menu option implies transition to non-existent step

PRM_001.description: Prompt template file not found on disk

PRM_002.description: Prompt template file references undeclared variable

PRM_003.description: Declared prompt context key is never referenced in template file

CON_001.description: Generated function/class signature does not match architecture blueprint

CON_002.description: Generated data structure does not match architecture data shape

CON_003.description: Generated file missing required imports declared in architecture

CON_004.description: Architecture declares a module that no plan task creates

DSP_001.description: File-write flow does not check target existence before proceeding

mission_control.description:
Core director flow. Orchestrates the entire agent lifecycle:
load state → integrate last result → reason about next action →
select task → dispatch with flow_directive. Operates at the
project_goal level — reasons about which capability to advance.

load_state.description: Load mission state, event queue, and frustration map

apply_last_result.description: Apply the returning flow's structured result to mission state

dispatch_retrospective.description: Dispatch retrospective — task succeeded after frustration

input_map.trigger_reason: Task completed after overcoming difficulty — capturing learnings

start_session.description: Open memoryful inference session for the director cycle

reason.description: Analyze mission state at goal level — reason about next action

end_failed_session.description: 0-token on reason — end the failed session

restart_session.description: Start a fresh session for reason retry

reason_retry.description: Retry reasoning after session reset — proceed regardless of result

decide_flow.description: Select the best action type based on analysis

resolver.prompt: Based on the director's analysis, choose the single best action type.

file_ops.description: Create, modify, refactor, document, or manage project files

diagnose_issue.description: Investigate a code issue methodically without modifying files

interact.description: Use the product — run it, interact with it, observe behavior, test specific features

project_ops.description: Manage project infrastructure — dependencies, config, directory structure, tooling

design_and_plan.description: Revise the mission plan — add, reorder, or remove tasks

quality_checkpoint.description: Run structural and behavioral quality inspection

quality_completion.description: All planned work done — run final quality gate

mission_deadlocked.description: No viable path forward — remaining tasks blocked

select_task.description: Select task and assemble flow_directive from goal + task

compose_directive.description: Director composes a novel flow_directive via inference

resolve_target.description: Determine target file for the dispatch

record_and_dispatch.description: Record dispatch decision and end session

end_session_and_dispatch.description: Close director session, then dispatch task flow

dispatch.description: Dispatch to selected task flow with flow_directive

dispatch_planning.description: No plan exists — dispatch to design_and_plan

end_session_and_design.description: Close director session before design_and_plan dispatch

end_session_quality_checkpoint.description: Close director session, then run quality checkpoint

quality_checkpoint_run.description: Run quality inspection on current state

end_session_quality_completion.description: Close director session, then run final quality gate

quality_completion_run.description: Final quality gate for mission completion

quality_failed_restart.description: Quality gate failed — restart with structured results

end_session_deadlock.description: Close session before deadlock rescue attempt

check_rescue_budget.description: Check if rescue attempt is available

rescue_research.description: Diagnostic search — last attempt to find a way forward

input_map.research_context: Mission is deadlocked. Searching for solutions.

content_key.description: Context key containing the note content

patch.description:
Surgical AST-aware editing. Presents symbols as a constrained
menu, rewrites each selected symbol in a memoryful inference
session. The most precise file operation available.

select_symbols.description: Present symbol menu — model picks next target or signals done

begin_rewrites.description: Queue selected symbols for sequential rewriting

rewrite_symbol.description: Model produces complete rewritten symbol body

finalize.description: Write modified file to disk and close session

no_changes_needed.description: Model determined no symbol changes needed

close_full_rewrite.description: Model requested full file rewrite instead of symbol editing

capture_bail_reason.description: Ask model why it's bailing — captures reasoning in session

close_bail.description: Close session after capturing bail reasoning

prepare_context.description:
Deterministic context preparation. Scans workspace, builds AST
repo map, grabs git summary, selects relevant files, and loads
content. Zero inference calls.

scan_workspace.description: Walk directory tree, extract file signatures

build_repomap.description: Build AST-based dependency map for file selection

git_summary.description: Grab recent git history — deterministic, no inference

select_relevant.description: Deterministic file selection via AST graph + heuristics

load_selected.description: Read full content of selected files

load_fallback.description: Fallback: load target file and immediate neighbors

empty_project.description: No files exist yet — return empty context bundle

project_ops.description:
Initialize project tooling and structure. Creates config files,
directories, installs dependencies, and detects validation tooling.

context_budget.description: Maximum files to include in context bundle

plan_setup.description: Determine what setup actions are needed

run_setup_commands.description: Run setup commands (pip install, mkdir, etc.)

detect_env.description: Detect and persist validation tooling for this project

quality_gate.description:
Project-wide quality validation. Three-phase gate:
1. Deterministic checks — file scan, cross-file consistency, lint
2. Behavioral validation — run_commands (fast-fail), then
   run_session (UX verification, completion mode only)
3. Summary — LLM reviews all results and determines pass/fail

plan_checks.description: LLM plans deterministic validation checks (imports, lint)

gather_dep_info.description: Extract imports and dependency manifest for coverage analysis

analyze_deps.description: LLM checks whether all imports are covered by declared dependencies

parse_dep_result.description: Parse dependency analysis — route based on coverage

check_mode_for_behavioral.description: Route based on mode — completion runs behavioral, checkpoint skips

run_startup_check.description: Run the project to verify it starts without errors

input_map.execution_persona: You are a QA tester. The project just started successfully. Interact with it briefly — try 2-3 basic operations to verify core functionality works. Report any errors, crashes, or unexpected behavior.

summarize.description: Summarize all quality results into actionable findings

evaluate_results.description: Parse quality summary and determine pass/fail

gate_fail.description: Project has quality issues needing attention

pass_empty.description: No files to check or could not plan checks

research.description:
Search for information and summarize into dense, actionable text.
The caller provides a specific research_query. This flow plans
search queries, executes them, and returns a summary.

plan_queries.description: Generate 2-3 targeted search queries from the research question

extract_queries.description: Parse generated queries into structured list

summarize.description: Distill search results into dense, actionable guidance

retrospective.description: Capture learnings from frustration recovery — what worked after struggling.

context_budget.description: Maximum files to include in context bundle

execute.description: Analyze what was tried, what failed, what ultimately worked

save_note.description: Save retrospective analysis as a persistent mission note

complete.description: Retrospective complete — learnings saved to notes

revise_plan.description:
Revise the mission plan based on new observations.
Can add tasks, reorder priorities, or mark tasks obsoleted.
Reasons at the goal level — which tasks serve which goals.

scan_workspace.description: Build AST-based project map so revisions are grounded in reality

evaluate_revision.description: Determine what plan changes are needed

apply_revision.description: Apply the revision to mission state

skip.description: No revision needed — publish result and return to mission_control

rewrite.description:
Replace an existing file's entire content via inference.
Reads the current file, generates a complete replacement,
writes to disk. Used when surgical patching is unavailable
or a structural change is needed.

context_budget.description: Maximum files to include in context bundle

discover_imports.description: Follow import statements and load referenced files

run_commands.description:
Execute shell commands deterministically. Start terminal, run
each command in sequence, capture output, close. Zero inference.

start_terminal.description: Start persistent shell for command execution

run_session.description:
Exploratory terminal session driven by an execution persona.
The model acts as a user — tries things, observes, adapts.
Multi-turn with memoryful inference session.

start_session.description: Start persistent shell and memoryful inference session

plan_next_command.description: Model decides what to do next based on persona and observations

execute_command.description: Send planned command to the terminal session

evaluate.description: Model evaluates whether to continue exploring or close

close_session.description: CLOSE — done observing (goal met, issue found, or stuck)

summarize_and_close.description: Produce a structured summary of the session before closing

close_session.description: Close the terminal session — caller interprets the summary

set_env.description:
Detect project validation tooling. Scans the project, makes one
inference call to determine language-appropriate syntax, lint,
and format commands, and persists to .agent/env.json.

detect_tooling.description: Infer validation commands for this project's languages

persist_env.description: Parse tooling config and save to .agent/env.json
